label: Journey Compression
description: Delegation compresses the user journey, reducing touchpoints and engagement opportunities

causal_translation.trigger_text: Delegation is active in this assumption profile.
causal_translation.rule_text: Delegated agents compress the navigation journey — fewer steps, fewer engagement points.
causal_translation.shift_text: Full delegation reduces journey to ~3 steps. Hybrid reduces to ~6 steps.
causal_translation.effect_text: Every eliminated step is a lost opportunity for attention capture, upsell, or discovery revenue.
